headline: Parker Hannifin Buys Circor Aerospace Business for $2.5 Billion
summary: Parker Hannifin  is spending $2.6 billion to buy another aerospace business, part of  KKR  -owned Circor International.  Both Parker Hannafin and KKR shares fell on Thursday.  KKR inched down 0.9% to $93.46.

headline: Parker-Hannifin Buys $2.55B Flight-Critical Systems Business
summary: Parker-Hannifin (PH) shares fall after announcing a $2.55 billion acquisition of CIRCOR Aerospace's commercial and defense business.

headline: KKR Sells CIRCOR Aerospace to Parker Hannifin for $2.55 Billion
summary: NEW YORK & BURLINGTON, Mass., May 21, 2026--KKR and CIRCOR International ("CIRCOR" or the "Company"), a global manufacturer of flow control products for industrial, naval, and aerospace markets, today announced the signing of a definitive agreement to sell CIRCOR Aerospace, the Company’s aerospace division, to Parker Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH), the global leader in motion and control technologies, for $2.55 billion. Funds managed by KKR first acquired CIRCOR for $1.8 billion in 2023 and will
